title: TC035-Prevent adding a category with a repeated name
description: Verifies that attempting to add a category whose name already exists in the list is rejected: either an error message is shown or the duplicate is not added, so the category appears exactly once.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:5173
        await page.goto("http://localhost:5173", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Fill 'Comida' into the category name input and click 'Agregar' to add the first category.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/main/div/section/form/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Comida')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/main/div/section/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Fill 'Comida' into the category name input and click 'Agregar' to attempt to add the duplicate category (second add attempt). Then verify duplicates are prevented.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/main/div/section/form/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Comida')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/main/div/section/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Comida').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Comida')).to_have_count(1, timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Ya existe una categoría con ese nombre').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
TEST FAILURE

ASSERTIONS:
- Duplicate category 'Comida' was added and appears twice in the categories list.
- No error or warning message about the duplicate category is visible on the page.
